v8:item.v8:content: Amount in Currency of Managerial Accounting
Total in the currency of regulated accounting (Dt)
Total in the currency of regulated accounting (Ct)
Total in the currency of management account (Dt)
Total in the currency of management account (Ct)
Total in the currency of scenario (Dt)
Total in the currency of scenario (Ct)
The amount in the IFRS currency (Debit)
The amount in the IFRS currency (Credit)
